para_trans: Department of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries,
Mantralaya Extension, Madam Cama Marg, Hall No. 518,
Transfer of Maharashtra Government employees and discharge of Government duties.
Pursuant to the provisions of Section 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay in Dismantling Act, 2005 and competent
Group-C cadre under Commissioner Animal Husbandry with prior approval of the Authority.
Requests from employees are being transferred.

para_trans: 2. The Deputy Commissioner concerned shall report immediately on the appearance of the employee in the post of transferor.
Animal husbandry and dairying should be introduced without any delay in the prescribed manner.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
